name: figure-agent
description: Quality kernel for paper schematics: Style Lock, compile/export reliability, visual QA gates, L4.5 host-orchestrated vision critique, and per-figure reproducibility. A human or any LLM/tool may author the TikZ source; the plugin enforces invariants regardless of author. Tool-agnostic: does not call external image-gen or vision APIs (vision tasks are delegated to the host Claude Code main loop).
